creator: djn@araxis.com
text:
The dns/unbound port (unbound-1.4.14) fails to compile with the default configuration. The error is:

.libs/daemon.o(.text+0xa2f): In function `daemon_init':
daemon/daemon.c:197: undefined reference to `ldns_key_EVP_load_gost_id'
.libs/val_sigcrypt.o(.text+0x193d): In function `dnskey_verify_rrset_sig':
validator/val_sigcrypt.c:1459: undefined reference to `ldns_gost2pkey_raw'
.libs/val_sigcrypt.o(.text+0x977): In function `dnskey_algo_id_is_supported':
validator/val_sigcrypt.c:425: undefined reference to `ldns_key_EVP_load_gost_id'
gmake: *** [unbound] Error 1
